name: Vegetarian Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and stir until well blended.
2. Transfer about 1 1/2 cups of the mix to three separate 1-pint containers.
3. Label each container as "Vegetarian Rice Mix."
4. Store the containers in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 4 1/2 cups of mix.
To prepare Vegetarian Rice:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine 1 1/2 cups of the mix with 2 cups cold water and 1 tablespoon butter or margarine.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and cover the saucepan.
4. Cook for 15 to 25 minutes, until all liquid is absorbed.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
